name: shai-hulud-npm-worm
description: MALICIOUS: Shai-Hulud npm worm and CVE-2025-54313 (Scavenger) — 691 packages with 1192 compromised versions. Self-propagating postinstall worm that clones itself into new npm packages, exfiltrates credentials, and creates GitHub repos.

indicators.what_happened: Postinstall script cloned itself and published new variants via npm, creating a self-propagating worm. Later variants (Shai-Hulud 2.0) use Bun-based payloads (setup_bun.js, bun_environment.js) and exfiltrate credentials to GitHub. 691 packages with 1192 compromised versions across CrowdStrike, @ctrl, @nativescript-community, @things-factory, and many others.
